---
applyTo: "frontend/src/**"
---

Apply the design system in `docs/ux/landing-page-v1.md` and root `CLAUDE.md`'s Product Design Philosophy to any code in this path.

Dark-only theme — don't remove `color-scheme: dark` from `globals.css`. Use the existing tokens (`--gold`, `--hairline`, `--muted-foreground`) instead of ad-hoc colors; gold is sparing (CTAs, "Active" status), not decorative. Headings use Fraunces (`font-heading`); body is Geist Sans. Card lists must mark only the MVP-active cards (HDFC Infinia, HDFC Diners Black, Axis Atlas, Axis Magnus, Amex Platinum Travel, SBI Cashback) as "Active" — everything else is "Coming soon."
